description: An aerodynamicist is modifying the eCRM-001 transport aircraft to serve as a military patrol variant. You need to add two underwing external fuel tanks and calculate the new total wetted area. Read the specification memo at /home/ga/Desktop/external_stores_spec.txt for the exact dimensions and locations. In OpenVSP (which is loaded with the baseline model), add a new Pod component for the tank, set its dimensions (Length and Fineness), configure its XForm location (X, Y, Z), and enable Planar Y symmetry so it appears on both wings. Save the updated model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_military.vsp3. Then, run a CompGeom analysis (Analysis > CompGeom) on the new configuration. Find the new Total Wetted Area from the results and write it into a report file at /home/ga/Desktop/stores_report.txt.
